title: Skibidi Toilet Decoration
description: Another little building/etc mod, this time with a random name because I can.
body:
# A small decoration mod, because you can never go wrong with a little extra blocks to build with.

![Mod Features](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/u7i3TngN/images/87613198b27e110bc6dc5bac58f259b7116f6d3e.png)

**This mod adds various little features, mostly in the form of extra blocks.**

**However, it also contains new flowers, one for every dye that does not already have one, and a better way of farming Crying Obsidian!**

**Here are the current features:**

## Obsidian blocks
**You can now polish Obsidian and use it as a building material.**
- You can create Polished, Polished Bricks, and Smooth Obsidian. Each having their own Stair, Slab, and Wall.
- All of them can be crafted or stonecutted like normal, however Smooth Obsidian has to be smelted or blasted.
- Every extra obsidian block has half as much hardness and resistance as normal obsidian.

## Cracked Cobbled Deepslate
**As the name implies, you can now crack the cobbled deepslate block.**
- It can also be made into Stairs, Slabs, and Walls, for some reason. Usually cracked blocks don't get that treatment.
- Unlike other cracked blocks, this one is made by using a stonecutter.

## Flowers
**There are 6 new flower types which you can find in your world.**
 - **Daylily**      (Brown Dye)
 - **Gray Iris**    (Gray Dye)
 - **Hotel Flower** (Cyan Dye)
 - **Lush Rose**    (Lime Dye)
 - **Purple Daisy** (Purple Dye)
 - **Spiraea**      (Green Dye)

**Each flower has specific biomes that it can be found in.**
 - Daylily
   - Wooded Badlands
   - Windswept Forest
   - Flower Forest
   - Bamboo Jungle
   - Jungle
   - Sparse Jungle

 - Gray Iris
   - Birch Forest
   - Old Growth Birch Forest
   - Flower Forest
   - Windswept Forest
   - Windswept Gravelly Hills
   - Windswept Hills
   - Grove
   - Meadow

 - Hotel Flower
   - Old Growth Pine Taiga
   - Old Growth Spruce Taiga
   - Snowy Taiga
   - Taiga
   - Windswept Forest
   - Windswept Gravelly Hills
   - Windswept Hills

 - Lush Rose
   - Lush Caves
   - Mangrove Swamp
   - Swamp
   - Desert
   - Sparse Jungle
   - Desert (If there's dirt for it)
   - Warm Ocean (If there's dirt for it)
   - Lukewarm Ocean (If there's dirt for it)
   - Deep Lukewarm Ocean (If there's dirt for it)

 - Purple Daisy
   - Dark Forest

 - Spiraea
   - Birch Forest
   - Old Growth Birch Forest

**Each flower has its own biome tag, if you wanted to make them spawn elsewhere.**

**Each flower can also be bonemealed in order to produce a copy of itself.**

## Dimension Switch

**The Dimension Switch is a lever clone that can be placed on the side of Obsidian, but doesn't emit redstone power.**
- When switched on, it can shatter an active nether portal if it was placed onto one.
- In the process, it will replace some of the Obsidian with Crying Obsidian, making it a little easier to obtain.
- If I ever add building blocks out of Crying Obsidian, then this might be very useful in getting a lot of them.
- It can be crafted with 2 Gold Nuggets, 1 Lever, 1 Eye of Ender, and 1 Crying Obsidian.
- You can add blocks to the tag **"skibiditoiletdecor:dimension_switch_supports"** if you'd like to add extra blocks that you can place it on. This will not influence the ability to convert obsidian, though.

**Aside from everything mentioned, this is a beta, and I plan to expand it with more features as I think of them.**
